import { products } from "../../data/products"; export default function Hero({ setPage }) { const spotlight = products.slice(0, 3); return (

New season arrival

Rooted in Kerala.
Built to wear everywhere.

Kuppayam is a small-batch clothing label with earthy palettes, soft silhouettes, and graphics that feel hand-built rather than mass-produced.

{[ ["08", "limited drops"], ["100%", "cotton-led focus"], ["24h", "reply time"], ].map(([value, label]) => (

{value}

{label}

))}

Featured drop

Fresh fabric, earthy graphics, slow release.

Live
{spotlight.map((product, index) => (

{product.category}

{product.name}

₹{product.price.toLocaleString()}

))}
); }
